description: Golden test cases for message-polish skill evolution

cases.input: 幫我潤飾這段訊息：我想跟你說一下那個東西的事情，就是之前提到的那個專案，我覺得可能需要再多花一些時間才能完成，希望你能理解。
expected_traits: Preserves the original meaning (project delay notification)

cases.input: Polish this message: Hey, so I was thinking maybe we could push back the deadline a bit? I know it's not ideal but things have been crazy busy and I think we need more time to do it right.
expected_traits: Clear and direct without being abrupt

cases.input: 潤飾：客戶說他們不喜歡目前的設計方案，覺得太複雜了，想要更簡單的版本
expected_traits: Respects original sentiment without diluting the feedback
